'''chaluzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycorhiza|mycorhiza]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-l-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycorhiza|mycorhiza]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chaluzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chælizith|chælizith]] || [[word:chælizij|chælizij]] || [[word:chælizish|chælizish]] || [[word:chælizi|chælizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chaluluzuth|chaluluzuth]] || [[word:chaluluzuj|chaluluzuj]] || [[word:chaluluzush|chaluluzush]] || [[word:chaluluzu|chaluluzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chaluzuth|chaluzuth]] || [[word:chaluzuj|chaluzuj]] || [[word:chaluzush|chaluzush]] || [[word:chaluzu|chaluzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chalufzuth|chalufzuth]] || [[word:chalufzuj|chalufzuj]] || [[word:chalufzush|chalufzush]] || [[word:chalufzuf|chalufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chaluzuthu|chaluzuthu]] || [[word:chaluzuju|chaluzuju]] || [[word:chaluzushu|chaluzushu]] || [[word:chaluzuku|chaluzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chaluzuth|chaluzuth]] || [[word:chaluzuj|chaluzuj]] || [[word:chaluzush|chaluzush]] || [[word:chaluzu|chaluzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chaluzuthul|chaluzuthul]] || [[word:chaluzujul|chaluzujul]] || [[word:chaluzushul|chaluzushul]] || [[word:chaluzukul|chaluzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chaluzuthuthu|chaluzuthuthu]] || [[word:chaluzujuju|chaluzujuju]] || [[word:chaluzushushu|chaluzushushu]] || [[word:chaluzuku|chaluzuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chaluzuthun|chaluzuthun]] || [[word:chaluzujun|chaluzujun]] || [[word:chaluzushun|chaluzushun]] || [[word:chaluzukun|chaluzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chaluzuthuoro|chaluzuthuoro]] || [[word:chaluzujuoro|chaluzujuoro]] || [[word:chaluzushuoro|chaluzushuoro]] || [[word:chaluzukuoro|chaluzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
